inputs.fcf_source: 50% Marvin floor $1.45 (FY2025 OCF less capex) / 50% Rosen cash-yield normalization $1.55 (`sohn_rosen_vtrs`)
inputs.normalization_note: Primary Lawrence path uses blended owner cash; Idorsia Phase III in synthesis + option overlay

growth_explanation.years_1_5: Rosen low–mid single-digit growth (Sohn 2026) plus EWSR $600–700M savings to cash and Q1 2026 revenue +8% YoY (10-Q); offsets legacy revenue decline.
growth_explanation.years_6_7: Step-down after cost program matures; branded mix lift if Idorsia readouts succeed.
growth_explanation.source: Rosen excerpt + 10-K EWSR + Q1 2026 10-Q; not trailing revenue CAGR alone

bear.notes: Generic price erosion; EWSR delayed; Idorsia fails

base.notes: Blended operating path: Rosen growth + re-rating toward 7x cash-yield on normalized earnings

bull.notes: Idorsia Phase III success + mix shift; Rosen 6x forward framing

idorsia_readout.notes: Capped event path: partial re-rating on readouts (~$24/sh); speaker 12mo double is bull-only (`sohn_rosen_vtrs`)

stance_proposal.override_reason: Blended synthesis ~14% approaches hold band; leverage and unproven moat keep watch until readouts or deleveraging

options.label: Selatogrel + cenerimod (Phase III)
options.evidence: DEF 14A_20241025; Rosen Sohn 2026; 6–9 month readout timing
options.notes: 30% P_base on $6/sh incremental [Assumption]; not in Lawrence FCF0

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Intangibles marked; equity low vs debt not hidden-asset pattern

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Eye Care and complex brands in segment mix; 10-K segment note

option_scan.question: Backlog not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Generic pharma revenue recognized on shipment

option_scan.question: Private / illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Biocon Biologics collaboration stake post-2022 biosimilars contribution (10-K definitions)

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: FY2025 divestiture gains in other income; excluded from normalized owner cash
option_scan.base_terminal_rationale: One-time portfolio sales not in 7-year run rate

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Biosimilar pipeline economics flow through Generics segment over time

option_scan.question: Idorsia Phase III assets (selatogrel, cenerimod)?
option_scan.evidence: Global R&D collaboration; exclusive rights; Phase III per DEF 14A_20241025 and 10-K
option_scan.base_terminal_rationale: Sized in synthesis path + optionality_gate; not fully in Lawrence FCF0

marvin_floor.notes: FY2025 OCF $2.32B less $400M maintenance capex [Assumption]; ex divestiture gains

external.source: David Rosen / Rubric Capital — Sohn Digging Deeper panel
external.notes: 7x cash-yield owner cash; low–mid single-digit growth; Idorsia readouts 6–9mo; 12mo double is bull-only

blended_best.weights: 50% marvin_floor ($1.45) / 50% Rosen normalized ($1.55); synthesis adds Idorsia catalyst path
blended_best.notes: Revised 2026-06-02: incorporate Rosen operating + capped catalyst per approved Sohn excerpt

notes: Idorsia P_base 30% and $6/sh incremental are [Assumption] until readout data
Rosen 12-month double not in base IRR; capped 2-year $24 payoff path in synthesis only

paths.label: Marvin floor (filings OCF)
paths.weight_why: Stress floor: OCF minus capex; excludes divestiture gains and pipeline.

paths.label: Rosen normalized owner cash (7yr Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Rosen 7x cash-yield on $1.55/sh + low–mid single-digit growth; Idorsia rights confirmed in 10-K.
weight_falsifiers: GAAP screens prove correct; no re-rating after readouts

paths.label: Blended operating (50/50 floor + Rosen)
paths.weight_why: Primary 7yr path at today's price on blended owner cash.

paths.label: Idorsia Phase III catalyst (capped event)
paths.weight_why: Rosen 6–9mo readouts; capped vs literal 12mo double — partial $24/sh in ~2yr proxy.
weight_falsifiers: Phase III readouts fail or delay beyond 12 months

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
